metadata.name: Get a Copy of an Annuity Statement

description: An annuity holder needs a copy of their most recent annual statement for their financial records.

nodes.task_description: Generate a copy of the most recent annual statement.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully generates the statement PDF.

nodes.task_description: Send the statement to the customer's secure online message center.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully delivers the document to the customer.
